notes: v2.4.14 — Purchasing, redesigned: four fast pages (Requisitions, Purchase Orders, Approvals, Vendors) that update live with no page reloads, full inline editing, one-click Convert-to-PO (full or partial), a 7-tab PO with per-line received-qty tracking, guided 3-mode receiving with a live requirements checklist, vendor-ready PO export to PDF/Word plus CSV, a faster vendor directory with inline approval/active toggles, and grouped one-click approvals. Operations Planner: Subitems — break an item into a ladder of child steps with parent roll-up of status/percent/dates, gantt drag moves the family, inherited dependencies, pin-to-override; Group By in the gantt; tidier department filter; cleaner group headers. CAPA: two-stage QC Close-out to a QC Closed state. Non-Conformance: print/save export with fixed modal height, Disposition filter, new Acceptable disposition, RMA + Internal categories. Projects/BOM: Part/Product toggle for MTF and assembly children, reorganize drag-and-drop fix, Date Received on mBOM part details. Departments: Quality Control (QC) added across planner, milestones, and tags. Travelers: clickable stat-card filters. AS9100: QSP tab for QMS references. CMF: read-only users can view zones. Names across REQs/POs/planner/CAPAs now show the correct person. Shop badge scan works from any screen. Desktop: drag files into dropzones. Five schema migrations (186-190).
